response.global_summary: A video featuring a musical performance of '偽物ラプソディー' (Nisemono Rhapsody) by VTuber Aki Rosenthal during her birthday event, followed by a detailed presentation of merchandise for the 'Akirose Birthday Celebration 2026'.

scenes.description: Aki Rosenthal performs the song '偽物ラプソディー' (Nisemono Rhapsody) on a 3D concert stage.
Aki Rosenthal talks to the audience and presents merchandise for the 'Akirose Birthday Celebration 2026'.
